creator: norbert.irmer@heim9.tu-clausthal.de
text:
Sorry, when I submitted this port the directory "qt22" contained
a qt snapshot which still had a seperate "libqgl.a".

I have added a qt version check to the configure script,
and now only link with this library when the qt version
is smaller then 220.
 
I have attached the new shar archiv to this mail.

Best regards,
Norbert
